title: Recommendation: expand automated eval coverage
summary: The team should expand automated evals because broader coverage will speed review and provide more data for model iteration.

claims.text: More cases will make the eval loop more reliable.
Coverage gains are enough to justify shipping the candidate.
Long traces are worth keeping because they help debug failures.

openQuestions: How many cases should the next run include?
How much trace detail should be retained?
recommendation: Expand automated evals and rely on reviewer spot checks to catch regressions.
